column7: original architecture: 3183 lines, LM-heavy decisions, MCP-blob context, no caching
§26 Deterministic Orchestration: CLI task router, profile-based tools, LLM-free adaptive filter, AgentCache prefixes, MCP→CLI replacement, command sequences. §27 implementation priority.
§28 Prompt Optimization: skill-based modular prompts, auto-load rules, emoji compression, 87% reduction. §29 Fast-Mode profile (3 speed tiers).
§30 Cache-Aware Orchestration: AgentCache pattern, shared prefixes, cache keys, worker skills, 60-80% cache hit targets.
§31 SupervisorAgent: full adaptive filter implementation, error/loop/noise detection, intervention rules, metrics (29-70% token reduction).
§32 MCP→CLI Replacement: 10 replacements, bash implementations, hybrid approach, ~28,500 tokens savings.
§33 Phase-Scheduled Execution: sequential phases, context handoff, skip rules, 55-67% token reduction.
§34 Optimization Summary: before/after comparison, per-task costs, latency, quality preservation, implementation priority.
§35 Optimization Checklist & Migration: phased implementation, commands, expected outcomes (84% token reduction target).
§36 Mastra-Specific Optimization: StructuredOutput caching, TokenLimiter, Signals, Processors, CostGuard.
§37 Worker Prompt Templates: complete prompts for all 7 workers (1,900 tok total, 88% reduction from 16,000).
§38 Configuration Optimization: YAML config, per-worker overrides, Mastra init pattern, settings comparison (16,000→~2,500 tok target).
§39 Error Handling & Security: deterministic error handlers, automated security scans, error recovery flow, config (94% auto-fix rate).
§40 Testing Optimization (-97% tokens), §41 Final Summary (96% reduction overall: 47k→2.1k tok/task, 80% faster, 95% cost savings).
